policy.selection_policy: active task-kind records only; reject stale/lab/archive context and full memory-bank scans

rejected_context.reason: Historical benchmark/lab goal ranges are rejected for default product review.
Full memory-bank scans are context dumps; this run may use only selected memory IDs.
.krn is runtime evidence/cache/ledger and must not be treated as authoritative memory.

records.summary: KRN memory must be selected from a store boundary and applied to a concrete action; docs/memory and .krn are not authoritative memory core.
records.action_rule: Reject repo-local memory-core claims and require selected memory IDs, rejected context, application guidance, and feedback.
records.invalidation_rule: Invalidate if goal-038 no longer owns the active memory boundary or if a service-backed store supersedes the local adapter.
